hyperedges.label: Three pillar focus-area pages share layout and nav structure
Legal pages share layout and footer pattern
Pages share global VCASSE navbar and footer template
Publication illustration set
hyperedges.notes: All six SVGs share viewBox 800x450, the VCASSE blue gradient palette (#082a4d to #0d4f8b/#1a6db5), accent #6cb4e4, IBM Plex Mono/Sans typography, and a consistent 'VCASSE / <CATEGORY>' eyebrow label format, indicating a unified publication illustration set.

hyperedges.label: Responsive nav breakpoint set
hyperedges.description: Six breakpoints of the VCASSE site header forming one responsive navigation system. Mobile uses a hamburger collapse; 820px through 1920px keep the same horizontal nav structure (logo + wordmark, Home/Research+/Events/About/Contact, View publications CTA) while progressively increasing whitespace and gutters as viewport width grows.

nodes.label: Nav at 820px
nodes.description: Tablet-width navigation. Logo + two-line wordmark 'Vancouver Centre for AI Safety, Sustainability, & Ethics' on left. Compact horizontal nav (Home underlined as active, Research with + indicator, Events, About, Contact) close to the wordmark with tight spacing. Dark 'View publications' CTA button on the right (no visible arrow due to compression).

nodes.label: Nav at 1024px
nodes.description: Small-desktop navigation. Logo + two-line wordmark on left, more whitespace between wordmark and nav cluster. Horizontal items: Home (active, underlined), Research +, Events, About, Contact. 'View publications ->' button visible on far right with arrow.

nodes.label: Nav at 1280px
nodes.description: Medium-desktop navigation. Same items (Home active, Research +, Events, About, Contact) with increased horizontal spacing. Wordmark on left, nav cluster center-right, 'View publications ->' button on far right separated by a subtle vertical divider.

nodes.label: Nav at 1440px
nodes.description: Large-desktop navigation. Logo + wordmark inset further from the left edge. Generous spacing between Home (active), Research +, Events, About, Contact. 'View publications ->' CTA button on far right with vertical divider separator.

nodes.label: Nav at 1920px
nodes.description: Extra-wide-desktop navigation. Largest left/right margins; wordmark and CTA pulled significantly inward from viewport edges. Horizontal nav (Home active, Research +, Events, About, Contact) with maximum spacing. 'View publications ->' button on right with vertical divider.

nodes.label: Nav on mobile
nodes.description: Mobile navigation. Logo + two-line wordmark on left, hamburger menu icon (three horizontal lines) on right. Horizontal nav items and CTA are collapsed behind the hamburger; structurally distinct from desktop breakpoints.

nodes.label: Home (nav item)
nodes.description: Primary navigation link. Shown as active/current page across all desktop breakpoints (underlined in accent color).

nodes.label: Research (dropdown nav item)
nodes.description: Navigation link with a '+' affordance indicating an expandable submenu/dropdown.

nodes.label: Events (nav item)
nodes.description: Standard navigation link for the Events section.

nodes.label: About (nav item)
nodes.description: Standard navigation link for the About page.

nodes.label: Contact (nav item)
nodes.description: Standard navigation link for the Contact page.

nodes.label: View publications (CTA button)
nodes.description: Dark navy primary call-to-action button with right-arrow icon. Visible at all desktop breakpoints; collapsed into the hamburger menu on mobile.

nodes.label: VCASSE logo + wordmark
nodes.description: Square navy 'V' logo paired with two-line wordmark 'Vancouver Centre for AI Safety, Sustainability, & Ethics'. Present on left side of every breakpoint.

nodes.label: Hamburger menu icon
nodes.description: Three-line hamburger icon used to collapse the full nav on mobile breakpoints.

links.description: Mobile collapses all nav items and CTA behind a hamburger icon; all desktop breakpoints expose them inline.
Spacing widens between wordmark and nav cluster as viewport grows from 820px to 1024px.
Horizontal padding and gaps between nav items increase; vertical divider before CTA becomes more pronounced.
Wordmark and CTA pulled further inward; nav items keep consistent typography while horizontal whitespace grows.
Maximum-width container caps content; large left/right gutters appear at 1920px while nav structure stays identical.
Hamburger icon replaces inline nav and CTA on mobile.
